/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++  -fPIC -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -O0 -g -D_DEBUG -DTARG_MIPS -shared -Wl,-soname,whirl2c.so -o ../../../lib/mips/whirl2c.so CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/init2c.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/PUinfo.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/st2c.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/stab_attr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/tcon2c.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/token_buffer.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/ty2c.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/w2c_driver.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/w2cf_parentize.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/w2cf_symtab.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/whirl2c_common.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/wn_attr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/wn2c.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/wn2c_pragma.cxx.o CMakeFiles/whirl2c-mips.dir/init.cxx.o ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil.a ../../../lib/mips/be.so ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarginfo.a -lm -ldl -Wl,-rpath,/home/jhj/compiler/build/lib/mips:
